name: REBEL Wash 12

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C81ECBD7-EDB4-45C8-B691-F931F60CA6BF

comment: The REBEL WASH 12™ is a powerful IP65-rated LED wash for many interior and exterior applications. Projecting up to 14000 lumens output from 12 60W RGBL emitters, the REBEL WASH 12™ is the ideal work horse luminare providing high output with powerful beams or wide washes, with excellent color quality. From intense primary colors to excellent white color quality with high CRI and calibrated color temperatures, the fixture is the perfect choice for a wide variety of applications. Pixel control or simple uniform access provide additional levels of excitement and effects, and the 360 degree endless Pan and Tilt rotation allows the fixture add another layer of creativity.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
